actions.title: Monthly Infection Control Audit
actions.description: Conduct monthly ward-level infection control audits measuring hand hygiene compliance, sterilisation standards, and PPE adherence. Target a hospital-acquired infection rate below 2% by enforcing clinical safety protocols and rapidly isolating infection sources.

actions.title: Staff Safety Training Programme
actions.description: Deliver quarterly clinical error prevention workshops for all nursing and medical staff, focusing on adverse event recognition, near-miss reporting, medication safety, and safe handover procedures. Build a culture of clinical risk awareness to reduce preventable patient harm.

actions.title: JCI Accreditation Preparation
actions.description: Lead the hospital through Joint Commission International accreditation, certifying clinical risk management frameworks, infection control protocols, and patient safety standards. Achieve full JCI certification within 12 months.

actions.title: Clinical Incident Reporting System
actions.description: Implement a real-time clinical incident reporting platform enabling staff to log near-misses, adverse events, medication errors, and safety hazards instantly. Analyse patterns through root-cause investigation to identify systemic clinical risks.

actions.title: Deploy Electronic Health Record System
actions.description: Deploy a cloud-hosted electronic health record system to replace all paper-based clinical documentation. Migrate patient data to a secure digital database and train all staff on the EHR platform before full go-live.

actions.title: Automate Patient Scheduling and Billing
actions.description: Implement automated digital workflows for appointment scheduling and invoice processing, replacing all manual administrative tasks. The online booking platform and automated billing software will create a fully data-driven administrative digital infrastructure.

actions.title: Upgrade Cybersecurity Infrastructure
actions.description: Conduct a full cybersecurity audit of all hospital IT networks, patch software vulnerabilities, and deploy multi-factor authentication on all clinical systems. Establish continuous network monitoring to protect the integrity of all digital health data.

actions.title: Implement AI-Powered Diagnostic Support Tools
actions.description: Integrate machine-learning diagnostic algorithms into radiology and pathology IT workflows to assist clinicians with image analysis and anomaly detection. The AI-powered software platform will accelerate diagnostic throughput.

actions.title: Launch Patient Satisfaction Survey Programme
actions.description: Launch a post-discharge satisfaction survey programme collecting patient feedback on various aspects of care. Analyse survey responses monthly to identify service gaps and drive targeted improvements.

actions.title: Reduce Outpatient Waiting Times Initiative
actions.description: Redesign outpatient triage flows to cut average waiting times by 40% and improve communication about expected wait durations. Deliver a smoother, more satisfying patient journey.

actions.title: Introduce Multilingual Patient Communication Services
actions.description: Deploy professional interpreter services and translated discharge leaflets in 12 languages. Ensure patients from all language backgrounds receive clear communication about their care plan.

actions.title: Deploy Patient Self-Service Portal
actions.description: Launch a self-service patient portal enabling patients to review test results, book appointments, and message their clinical team. Empower patients to actively manage their own care journey.

actions.title: Launch Clinical Leadership Development Programme
actions.description: Deliver a 12-month clinical leadership mentorship programme for senior nurses and junior doctors. Create an internal pipeline of skilled clinical managers to improve long-term workforce retention.

actions.title: Staff Wellbeing and Mental Health Support Initiative
actions.description: Establish a comprehensive staff wellbeing programme offering counselling services and burnout prevention workshops. Monitor employee engagement to reduce nursing turnover.

actions.title: Nurse Retention and Incentive Scheme
actions.description: Introduce a nurse retention incentive package featuring flexible shift scheduling and performance-based pay increments. Target a 25% reduction in nursing turnover.

actions.title: University Medical Internship Partnership Programme
actions.description: Formalise clinical internship and rotation partnerships with three regional universities. Establish the hospital as an employer of choice to improve recruitment outcomes.

actions.title: Annual Budget Review and Cost Reduction Audit
actions.description: Conduct a comprehensive annual departmental expenditure review to identify fiscal inefficiencies and eliminate non-essential operational costs. Deliver a 10% reduction in non-clinical overheads.

actions.title: Expand Private Patient and Revenue Services
actions.description: Develop a dedicated private patient revenue unit offering premium elective procedures and specialist outpatient packages. Grow private income streams to achieve long-term financial sustainability.

actions.title: Apply for Healthcare Grants and Government Subsidies
actions.description: Identify, prepare, and submit applications for all eligible government healthcare grants and funding schemes. Secure external revenue to finance infrastructure investment.

actions.title: Medical Supply Chain Optimisation Programme
actions.description: Centralise medical supply procurement, renegotiate supplier contracts, and implement just-in-time inventory management. Cut supply chain expenditure by 15%.
